recommendations.title: Madhouse
recommendations.overview: A young psychiatric intern unearths secrets about the mental health facility in which he works.

recommendations.title: Unsane
recommendations.overview: A woman is involuntarily committed to a mental institution where she is confronted by her greatest fear.

recommendations.title: The Hoarder
recommendations.overview: Ella discovers a terrifying secret when she becomes trapped in an underground storage facility. To survive she must join forces with a group of strangers, each with something to hide.

recommendations.title: The Djinn
recommendations.overview: A mute boy is trapped in his apartment with a sinister monster when he makes a wish to fulfill his heart’s greatest desire.

recommendations.title: The Forsaken
recommendations.overview: A young man is in a race against time as he searches for a cure after becoming infected with a virus that will eventually turn him into a blood-sucking vampire.

recommendations.title: Till Death
recommendations.overview: After a romantic evening at their secluded lake house, a woman wakes up handcuffed to her dead husband. Trapped and isolated in the dead of winter, she must fight off hired killers to escape her late spouse's twisted plan.

recommendations.title: From a House on Willow Street
recommendations.overview: After a young woman is kidnapped, her captors soon come to realize that in fact they may be the ones in danger and this young woman has a dark secret inside her.

recommendations.title: Painless
recommendations.overview: While searching for a solution to his serious health condition, David, a renowned neurosurgeon, discovers a sinister secret hidden in the past.

recommendations.title: Dracula's Daughter
recommendations.overview: A countess from Transylvania seeks a psychiatrist’s help to cure her vampiric cravings.

recommendations.title: Spell
recommendations.overview: A father survives a plane crash in rural Appalachia, but becomes suspicious of the elderly couple who take him in to nurse him back to health with the ancient remedies.
